title: 2 Piece Jumbo Bath sheets 100% Combed Cotton Extra Large Bath Towel bale set super Absorbent Soft Cream 2 Pack 90X180 CM Bath sheets Extra Large Bathroom Set Beach Towel
features: WEAVE With 100% Combed Cotton For Comfort, Softness And Absorbency.
QUALITY - These Pack of 2 Bath sheets are Premium Quality Luxury Towels set, Soft, Durable and Wonderfully Absorbent for Family, Couples and Individuals.
CARE-Do Not Use Bleach, Softners And Iron As It Could Damage Quality Of Towels. Machine Washable At 40°C For Easy Care, Tumble Dry At Low Temperature. Always Wash Towels Separately to minimize fluff.
description: Towels are essential products of our daily life; creation of towels is a unique art and we have learnt and master this art through practical knowledge and experience. We have converted our knowledge and expertise into beautiful designs and quality products. We have put lots of efforts to make bath towels that suits to your needs and requirements which satisfy your aesthetic sense. We have left no stone unturned to provide our customers the valued product that they are paying for. Our objective is to sale our bath towels to make our customers satisfied and comfortable. Please choose from our outstanding range of luxurious supreme quality bath sheets extra large towels made with the finest quality 100% combed cotton to give you wonderful softness, great absorbency, and super durability of these bath sets. These unique properties of bathroom towels bath set make us the only choice when it comes to giving your bathroom an elegant & distinctive look. Take a look at our stunning and fabulous range of bath towels, available in a range of colors, styles and sizes. We are offering Pack of 2 extra-large bath sheets bathroom set to fulfill your needs for hotel spa gym travel and beach towel. we are also offering these towels set in 14 different colors to diversify to suits your requirements. If you have any question and complaint please feel free to contact our customer service and we would definitely solve your queries as soon as possible.
